prompt: Using the provided reference image as a visual-quality and lighting reference, transform the scene into a photorealistic 16:9 desktop wallpaper of DUMBO, Brooklyn. Replace the lighthouse coastline with an urban street-canyon composition: exactly 2 rows of tall red-brick warehouse buildings on the left and right, 1 large leafy tree in the left foreground, and 1 centered steel suspension bridge tower filling the background. Frame the Empire State Building precisely through the lower arch of the bridge. Add 2 rows of parked cars along both curbs, a small cluster of pedestrians near the bridge approach, and wet-looking reflective street details for depth. Include exactly 2 readable street elements: a vertical red banner reading DUMBO on the right building and a black-and-white ONE WAY sign below it. Preserve the reference image’s crisp high-resolution realism, blue sky with scattered clouds, rich contrast, golden side lighting, and dreamy wallpaper polish. No lighthouse, ocean, rocks, waves, or coastal buildings.
